dict.string: SUBQUERY(extensionItems, $item, SUBQUERY($item.attachments, $attachment, ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.jpeg" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.png" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.gif" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.compuserve.gif" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.heic" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.heif" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.tiff" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.bmp" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.mpeg-4" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.quicktime-movie" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.avi" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.mpeg" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.webm" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.3gpp" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.mp3" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.aac-audio" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.flac" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.xiph.ogg" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.waveform-audio" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.opus" OR ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.adobe.pdf").@count > 0).@count > 0
